Origami Dragons

by Marc Kirschenbaum

Published:
2020 by Tuttle Publishing
Pages:
48
Binding:
Kit with booklet, paper and online videos
Language:
English
ISBN-13:
9780804853101
ISBN-10:
080485310X

Buy from: origami-shop.com
Buy from: Amazon.com
Buy from: Amazon.jp

Find it on ebay


Buy from: Amazon.com
Buy from: Amazon.jp

Skill Level Simple to complex
Clear diagrams? Yes
Tinted diagrams (to show 2 sides of paper)? Yes
Photos of completed models? Yes
Is there indication to the model size resulting from size of starting paper? No
Are the models "Pure" origami (From a single square - no cuts)? Yes

There are 10 Origami Designs in Origami Dragons:

Design Designer Page Details Photo

Dragon footprint

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Marc Kirschenbaum8Square
Amphiptere - the winged serpent

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Marc Kirschenbaum10Square
Folded by Wilson Yeung

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Dragon hatchling

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Chinese dragon

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Rearing dragon

Imaginary beings - Dragons

Marc Kirschenbaum42Square
